defs: (bound form) to clasp under the arm
to exploit sb's point of weakness to force them to do one's bidding

pinyin: xie2 tian1 zi3 yi3 ling4 tian1 xia4
defs: (expr.) hold the feudal overlord and you control the whole country

pinyin: xie2 tian1 zi3 yi3 ling4 zhu1 hou2
defs: (expr.) hold the feudal overlord and you control his vassals
to hold under duress; to abduct
